title: Nakhon Ratchasima, Nakhon Ratchasima — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nakhon Ratchasima, Nakhon Ratchasima: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nakhon Ratchasima is a city in Nakhon Ratchasima with a population of 450,000. Known as Korat, this gateway to northeastern Thailand offers a very affordable lifestyle with access to both urban amenities and natural attractions like Khao Yai National Park.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
